# P-B-004 — Sub-30-day pre-tender incorporation

> Constitution éclair avant appel d'offres

## Description (EN)

Company incorporated < 30 days before the tender publication that it then won.

## Description (FR)

Société constituée moins de 30 jours avant la publication du marché qu'elle a remporté.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Rapid incorporation — company incorporated < 30 days before the award. Tighter version of P-B-001's 90-day window for the highest-confidence cases.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.20 + weight 0.7. The 30-day window is the hard threshold beyond which the legitimate-startup explanation becomes implausible.

## Known false-positive traps

Any of P-B-001's traps, only stronger because the time window is tighter.

## Production wiring

Requires company-filing + award events on the same entity with parseable dates.
